title: Warm Chewy Saudi Arabian Ume Plum Skewers
description: A fresh and indulgent Saudi Arabian dish featuring ume plum, long fermentation dough, and a shojin friendly approach, all grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the long fermentation dough into 12 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place an ume plum in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the plum to form a triangle or square shape and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with sugar.
Place the skewers on the binchotan grill and cook for 10 minutes on each side.
Brush the tops of the skewers with lemon juice and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Continue to cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the dough is golden brown and the plums are tender.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
